tasks.instruction: Complete each sentence with one word. The dashes show you the missing letters.

items.stem: A _ _ e _ _ _ _ _ is a very large grey animal with a long trunk and big ears.
My grandmother has a _ _ r _ _ _ that can repeat words and fly around the house.
We saw a beautiful _ _ t _ _ _ _ _ _ flying over the lake near our hotel.
The _ _ t _ _ _ caught a mouse in the garden last night.
An _ _ _ _ p _ _ is a sea animal with eight long arms.
We could hear the _ _ b _ _ singing beautifully in the tree every morning.
